title: Update node-sass to version 4.0.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [node-sass](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-sass) just published its new version 4.0.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency node-sass
New version 4.0.0
Type dependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of node-sass. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/releases/tag/v4.0.0)

LibSass 3.4.0

Check out the LibSass release notes for more information.

--- The new version differs by 11 commits . - [`d8b6ecd`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/d8b6ecd62ffd5635dc0f5b67d39448227c0eedf4) Deploy - [`8b46b39`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/8b46b3926dfa2501cad043a708fc4c7a964a0fea) 4.0.0 - [`c1b05b3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/c1b05b39d8f0bf7d0522df53ef85196a9f7849e4) Merge pull request #1800 from sass/feat/libsass-3.4.0.1 - [`dd946fd`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/dd946fdb6838c72f4652741105282b7747b5e5f2) Update sourcemap test fixtures to match new LibSass behaviour - [`79e86f3`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/79e86f32ce3661569748164d26e2f2667a79699a) Tweak spec.js to support :only_on and multiple :todo engines - [`6532189`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/65321899b750b87c1b280b013ed9e6b098d1ccbf) Bump LibSass to 3.4.0 - [`1bb893f`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/1bb893f386fc9751e317fa8b96f4dbd3c2623534) 3.13.1 - [`b527d91`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/b527d913793cc477f633b03108e5c881bf12c0f2) Removed top-level return statement from cli (#1827) - [`4491ab4`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/4491ab436ee217038460a46f14c15c0368dda456) Check options to be an object (#1825) - [`a7e6bea`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/a7e6beadfb48deb7473eb259258a0997a6190016) Bump sass-spec@^3.3.6-5 - [`dc92c18`](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/commit/dc92c18e1dffd4acbab69e76c4bcda238f52da27) Update sourceComments documentation in README.md (#1820) See the [full diff](https://github.com/sass/node-sass/compare/2e7f37084a1b30e93b142674cfed1fcd05c79e82...d8b6ecd62ffd5635dc0f5b67d39448227c0eedf4). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
